details.test: Task 1: Save 3 latest crypto regulation articles to Crypto Weekly
Task 2: Select best neobank savings account and open its review
Task 3: Create Bitcoin and Apple price alerts
Task 4: Subscribe to Banking Regulation (daily) and Fintech Startups (weekly) only
Task 5: Copy article link via share tool and open via copied URL
Task 6: Create US Banks watchlist and sort by market cap
Task 7: Add top funded companies to 2024 Unicorns collection
Task 8: Find highest-rate online savings account and open related article
Task 9: Save best high-rated payment app to Compare Later with note
